title: GitHub Actions execution profile
objective: Add L3_GITHUB_ACTION as an execution profile skeleton for remote CI-based agent runs, artifact collection, and PR comment workflows.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow template for harness-run that can be disabled by default or manually triggered.
Support workflow_dispatch inputs for task path, adapter, and execution profile.
Upload run artifacts such as patch.diff, run-result.json, and summary.md.
Emit a workflow summary that mirrors the local run summary.
Document required permissions and explain why PR comments/checks are staged behind later hardening.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: L3 GitHub Actions 실행 profile의 기본 구조를 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
